ddls:
CREATE TABLE "terminals" (
  "terminal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each terminal */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the terminal (e.g., B12-3) */,
  "wiring_color" TEXT /* Wiring color associated with the terminal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the terminal */,
  "terminal_type" TEXT /* Type of terminal (e.g., male, female, connector) */,
  "terminal_description" TEXT /* Short description of the terminal's purpose */,
  "terminal_status" TEXT /* Status of the terminal (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("terminal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wiring_diagrams" (
  "diagram_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wiring diagram */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the electrical system the diagram belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wiring diagram */,
  "diagram_file" TEXT /* File path to the wiring diagram file */,
  "diagram_revision" TEXT /* Version number of the wiring diagram */,
  "diagram_format" TEXT /* File format of the wiring diagram (e.g., PDF, DWG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagram_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wiring_diagrams_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES electrical_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electrical_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electrical system */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the electrical system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the electrical system */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Type of electrical system (e.g., powertrain, chassis, safety) */,
  "system_description" TEXT /* Short description of the electrical system's purpose */,
  "system_status" TEXT /* Status of the electrical system (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of component (e.g., sensor, actuator, switch) */,
  "component_subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of component (e.g., sensor type, actuator type, switch type) */,
  "component_description" TEXT /* Short description of the component's purpose */,
  "component_status" TEXT /* Status of the component (e.g., active, inactive, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_specs" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the specification belongs to */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter of the specification (e.g., voltage, current) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "spec_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_specs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_data" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the test belongs to */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test */,
  "test_result_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the test result */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Description of the environment in which the test was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_data_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the condition belongs to */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition (e.g., voltage, current) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the condition */,
  "condition_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the condition value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specified_conditions" (
  "specified_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specified condition */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the specified condition belongs to */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter of the specified condition (e.g., voltage, current) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "specified_condition_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the specified condition value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specified_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specified_conditions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection */,
  "terminal1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first terminal in the connection */,
  "terminal2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second terminal in the connection */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of connection (e.g., series, parallel) */,
  "connection_description" TEXT /* Short description of the connection's purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connections_terminal1_id FOREIGN KEY ("terminal1_id") REFERENCES terminals ("terminal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connections_terminal2_id FOREIGN KEY ("terminal2_id") REFERENCES terminals ("terminal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terminal_connections" (
  "terminal_connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each terminal connection */,
  "terminal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the terminal in the connection */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component in the connection */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of connection (e.g., series, parallel) */,
  "terminal_connection_description" TEXT /* Short description of the terminal connection's purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("terminal_connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terminal_connections_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terminal_connections_terminal_id FOREIGN KEY ("terminal_id") REFERENCES terminals ("terminal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_connections" (
  "component_connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component connection */,
  "component1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first component in the connection */,
  "component2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second component in the connection */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of connection (e.g., series, parallel) */,
  "component_connection_description" TEXT /* Short description of the component connection's purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_connections_component2_id FOREIGN KEY ("component2_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_connections_component1_id FOREIGN KEY ("component1_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_control" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the electrical system the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the electrical system */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Short description of the version changes */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Username or ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_control_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES electrical_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "component_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "component_version_description" TEXT /* Short description of the component version changes */,
  "component_version_author" TEXT /* Username or ID of the user who created the component version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
